name: atelier
description: Atelier — 이미지 붙여넣기가 되는 GUI 터미널
author: BYKAYLE

scripts.tauri:trust: APP=src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Atelier.app; PLIST="$APP/Contents/Info.plist"; xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine "$APP" 2>/dev/null; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :NSContactsUsageDescription Atelier runs Claude/Hermes sessions that may check Contacts metadata; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST" 2>/dev/null || /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSContactsUsageDescription string Atelier runs Claude/Hermes sessions that may check Contacts metadata; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST"; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription Atelier runs Claude/Hermes sessions that may check Photos metadata; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST" 2>/dev/null || /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription string Atelier runs Claude/Hermes sessions that may check Photos metadata; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST"; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :NSAppleEventsUsageDescription Atelier may automate approved local CLI/session workflows; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST" 2>/dev/null || /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSAppleEventsUsageDescription string Atelier may automate approved local CLI/session workflows; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST"; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :NSMicrophoneUsageDescription Atelier terminal sessions may run tools that request microphone access; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST" 2>/dev/null || /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSMicrophoneUsageDescription string Atelier terminal sessions may run tools that request microphone access; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST"; /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Set :NSCameraUsageDescription Atelier terminal sessions may run tools that request camera access; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST" 2>/dev/null || /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c 'Add :NSCameraUsageDescription string Atelier terminal sessions may run tools that request camera access; approval is stored by macOS TCC.' "$PLIST"; codesign -s 'Atelier Local Code Signing' --deep --force --options runtime --entitlements src-tauri/Atelier.entitlements --identifier com.atelier.app "$APP" 2>/dev/null && echo 'Atelier.app signed with stable cert + hardened runtime + TCC entitlements' || codesign -s - --deep --force --options runtime --entitlements src-tauri/Atelier.entitlements "$APP" 2>/dev/null; echo done
